what_it_does: This file is a channel-attachment metadata record that links attachment att-f2cb805d in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-760c7152, with attachment type board_items and a creation timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-760c7152.
The added field is an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI to reference a board item.
The file functions purely as a cross-reference stub between channel memory and a board item.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References external entities with a URI scheme (board://).
Leaves the body empty after the frontmatter.
concerns: No content beyond metadata, so meaning depends entirely on the external board item.
No author, version, or content-hash fields are present.
No explicit purpose statement is given.
notes: A metadata stub that records a dragnet-development channel attachment pointing to a specific board item.
questions: What content or action does board item item-760c7152 represent?
Is this attachment generated automatically or curated manually?
What semantics does the board_items attachment_type carry?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the metadata accurately records an attachment to a board item.
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing channel memory with board items.
intention_signals: Establish a durable, timestamped link between a channel memory attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved or contextualized later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI to target a board item inside a channel attachment is the main distinctive feature; otherwise it is a standard metadata stub.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, which a fused system could retain as a linkage record.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown attachment metadata file linking dragnet-development channel attachment att-f2cb805d to board item item-760c7152 with type board_items and a creation timestamp.
